Package org.apache.juneau.rest.client.okhttp

Class OkHttpTransportBuilder

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.rest.client.okhttp.OkHttpTransportBuilder
public final class OkHttpTransportBuilder extends Object
Fluent builder for OkHttpTransport.

Obtain an instance via OkHttpTransport.builder().

Beta — API subject to change: This type is part of the next-generation REST client and HTTP stack (org.apache.juneau.marshall.ng.*). It is not API-frozen: binary- and source-incompatible changes may appear in the next major Juneau release (and possibly earlier).

See Also:
  • juneau-ng REST client
Since:
9.2.1

  • Method Details

    • httpClient

      public OkHttpTransportBuilder httpClient(okhttp3.OkHttpClient value)
      Sets the underlying OkHttpClient to use.

      If not set, a default client is created via new OkHttpClient().

      OkHttp recommends sharing a single OkHttpClient instance across the application. When sharing, the caller is responsible for lifecycle management; OkHttpTransport.close() will still attempt to drain the client's connection pool and executor.

      Parameters:
      value - The client to use. Must not be null.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • build

      public OkHttpTransport build()
      Builds and returns the OkHttpTransport.
      Returns:
      A new instance. Never null.
